explanation.text: **The Logic:** SCSS interest is paid quarterly — on April 1, July 1, October 1, and January 1. The interest is credited to the subscriber's savings bank or post office account. **The Trap:** Monthly is POMIS. Half-yearly is government bond interest. SCSS specifically pays quarterly. **Cross-Exam Context:** SCSS interest payment frequency is tested in Series XVII. Compare with POMIS (monthly) and bank FDs (monthly/quarterly/annual options). **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Quarterly interest from SCSS (up to Rs.30 lakh investment) provides a reliable income base. Combine with POMIS (monthly income) for a mixed frequency income stream.
